description: Research ledger for Lean PS: the shared commuting/equivariance schema and its two instances (Kripke-Joyal forcing persistence; Lorentz-force covariance). Statuses follow the forcing paper's discipline: P proved relative to stated hypotheses, D definitional architecture, S specification/conformance contract, M modeling postulate, C measurable conjecture, O open. Direct deps/consumes are stored here; the transitive M/C/O debt closure is computed mechanically by tools/leanps_audit.py, which also regenerates docs/18_LEAN_PS_LEDGER.md. The two instances are NOT identified: the forcing instance is relational, partial, Prop-valued preservation; the physics instance is total, group-indexed, on-the-nose equality. Same interface, different semantics.

M-Pers.where: forcing paper status ledger; Lean: Persistent typeclass; probed by kernel/sweep.py E7
